title: Silken Tofu Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Chinese-inspired stir fry made with silken tofu, pasta, and Italian seasonings. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook pasta according to package instructions.
Drain the pasta and set it aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the silken tofu and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the Italian seasoning and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the tofu mixture.
Optional: add your favorite vegetables to the stir fry for extra flavor and nutrients.
